selected_important_turn.text: awe, that's true,  Now I fell bad for the bears.  I'll take 2 waters and 1 food, you can have all the firewood.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn is the decisive allocation choice: the agent accepts the split structure and claims both waters (their highest-value item) and a food. It locks in a zero-sum distribution of the scarce resource (water) and thus determines the outcome and relationship consequences.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: Although the opponent proposed a fair-looking split and explicitly gave the chooser power, taking both waters ignores the opponent’s previously stated 'water is a must' and turns a cooperative offer into a fully competitive claim. That risks harming perceived fairness and trust and misses a chance to create a more integrative, mutually satisfactory outcome (for example by trading or splitting the water).
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Preserve the cooperative framing: either choose a more balanced allocation (e.g., one water + compromise on another item) or accompany the choice with an explicit concession/compensation (e.g., offer something that matters less to you in return, or offer to split use/rotate). Alternatively, ask a quick clarifying question about the opponent’s need strength before finalizing to invite a trade rather than unilaterally claiming both waters.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: could increase if you open options for trade/compensation instead of taking both waters; otherwise remains the same
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: would improve if you chose a more balanced split or offered compensation; currently perceived fairness is weaker
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: maintained (they already accepted), but could be smoother if you had signaled compromise beforehand
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: would improve (more trust/rapport) if you avoid taking both waters or explain/compensate; currently slightly harmed by appearing self-interested

value2reason.Low: It's so hot we won't need much of a fire.
value2reason.Medium: Relaxing always makes snacking more fun, so more food is always eaten
value2reason.High: It is super hot, so we will need to stay hydrated and drink lots of water

value2reason.Low: We're fairly skinny and don't eat much.
value2reason.Medium: My wife gets really cold at night.
value2reason.High: My family wants to do a lot of hiking.

dialogue.text: Hello, what a great time of year to go camping.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Yes I can't wait! So sick of being stuck at home. 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: It will be nice to get out and explore the great outdoors, even if it is super hot!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I agree. What supplies could you use more of?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Water for sure, need to stay extra hydrated.  How about you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Haha yup I had a feeling about that one. ;-) Yeah my wife has a bunch of crazy hikes planned so water is a must here too. What else?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Food of course, always snack more when relaxing.  Agree on the hiking.  Out in the woods, we won't have to wear masks!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Well we don't want to make all the bears sick though haha. Okay so let's try this... one of us gets 2 waters with 1 firewood and 1 food. I think that's as close as we'll get to equal. You can choose.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: awe, that's true,  Now I fell bad for the bears.  I'll take 2 waters and 1 food, you can have all the firewood.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I think that works for me. I'll take 2 waters and 1 food, and you can have all the firewood. Let me know if you agree.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I think that works for me. I'll take 2 waters and 1 food, and you can have all the firewood. Let me know if you agree.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Deal confirmed! I'll take 2 waters and 1 food, and you get all the firewood. Let's head out and enjoy the trip!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: The deal has already been confirmed. I am leaving now.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
